Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The task produce two POWL models one with potential unfairness XOR branch for community affiliation check and one without unfairness no XOR branch all go through same cultural fit check

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Use appropriate activity labels ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Use loop for data completeness XOR for bias etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to provide the POWL models in code following the example shown import pm4py etc The code must define the models

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we need to generate two POWL model objects one with XOR branch that includes CommunityAffiliationCheck and the other with just a single cultural fit evaluation no XOR Also need to incorporate loops

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loops in POWL are defined as A B which is a loop node between submodels A and B

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Simplify Let us define the initial part ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck maybe RequestMoreInfo loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can design as ReceiveApplication Loop that checks completeness Check Transition label DataCompletenessCheck RequestInfo Transition label RequestMoreInfo Loop OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children Check RequestInfo

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Loop OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo models a loop where DataCompletenessCheck is done first then either exit or execute RequestMoreInfo then repeat That matches a typical pattern while data incomplete ask for more info

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we need root StrictPartialOrder with nodes ReceiveApplication LoopData SkillAssessment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Define transitions ReceiveApp Transition label ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck Transition label DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Transition label RequestMoreInfo LoopData OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment Transition label SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck Transition label CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Transition label CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview Transition label ManagerialReview FinalDecision Transition label FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unfair model after SkillAssessment we have XOR choice either go to CulturalFitCheck standard or go to CommunityAffiliationCheck which leads to biased outcome Then after the chosen branch we go to ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: XorUnfair OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we need to order SkillAssessment to XorUnfair XorUnfair to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus root unfair StrictPartialOrder nodes ReceiveApp LoopData SkillAssessment XorUnfair ManagerialReview FinalDecision Add edges ReceiveApp to LoopData LoopData to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to XorUnfair XorUnfair to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For fair model after SkillAssessment we directly go to CulturalFitCheck no XOR Then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision There is no community affiliation branch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then root fair StrictPartialOrder nodes ReceiveApp LoopData SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Add edges ReceiveApp to LoopData LoopData to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We can optionally still have a loop for data completeness So this is straightforward
